finding: `withTaskScopedCommitIndex` built the temporary index from HEAD and re-added bundle files from the working tree, overwriting a composer partial-staged projection with foreign worktree content before pre-commit ran.
expectedBehavior: The temporary index must plant the exact approved live-index blobs for selected paths instead of re-reading the working tree, preserving partial staging and excluding other tasks' index content.
evidenceOrRepro: TASK-TEAM-0079 queue-only projection was repeatedly replaced by 0075 worktree edits inside the wrapper's temporary index, so pre-commit saw handoff imports the composer never staged.
followUp: Keep a regression proving a partial-staged blob survives the task-scoped commit wrapper byte-for-byte while unrelated worktree edits stay out.
